scripts.clean:reports: rimraf playwright-report playwright-report-* test-results test-results-* allure-results allure-results-* allure-report allure-report-*
scripts.storage:clean:npm: npm cache verify && npm cache clean --force && npm cache verify
scripts.storage:pw:browsers:refresh: playwright uninstall && playwright install chromium firefox && playwright install --list
scripts.storage:maintenance: npm run storage:clean:reports && npm run storage:clean:npm && npm run storage:pw:browsers:list
